query: SELECT userId, COUNT(*) as cycle_count, SUM(totalPuzzles) as total_puzzles FROM cycle_history GROUP BY userId ORDER BY cycle_count DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute SELECT userId, COUNT(*) as cycle_count, SUM(totalPuzzles) as total_puzzles FROM cycle_history GROUP BY userId ORDER BY cycle_count DESC;
